title: arabis glabra subsp. pseudoturritis
intro: Arabis glabra subsp. pseudoturritis, also known as rock cress, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions, primarily found in the Mediterranean area. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Arabis glabra subsp. pseudoturritis can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
